description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized, elongated human figure with angular, geometric features. The figure stands upright with arms crossed over the chest, and the head is slightly bowed, giving a contemplative or solemn appearance. The surface is matte and appears to be made of a light-colored stone or concrete, with a rough, unpolished texture. The form is minimalist, with sharp edges and blocky shapes defining the limbs and head, while the facial features are only subtly indicated. The base is integrated into the figure, providing stability and a sense of unity. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements.
description: A minimalist, angular human figure sculpture with crossed arms and a bowed head, rendered in light stone or concrete with a rough matte finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the straight, blocky back of the figure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular profile of the head and the straight, geometric side of the body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the crossed arms, bowed head, and subtle facial features of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angular head and the geometric side of the body, mirroring the left side.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
